emails.subject: Revised DeLay op ed
emails.body: Revised DeLay op ed Steve great guidance. Cynthia hope we're in time. Jeff the fifth paragraph has some supply/demand figures for the early part of this week that I heard but can't track down the written source. Any suggestions? Please review and don't hesitate to call me this weekend. Best bet is home number 914-736-9504 or cell phone 914-318-1568. Jeannie
